description_long: This obelisk is a tall, slender monument with a rectangular cross-section and a flat top. The lower portion features a decorative relief with vertical greenish ribbing and an Art Deco-inspired motif, while the upper section is composed of smooth, tan stone blocks. The surface is segmented by visible horizontal and vertical seams, giving the impression of large stone tiles. The ornamentation is concentrated on the lower half, with the upper half remaining plain and unadorned. The overall appearance suggests a blend of historical and decorative urban design, suitable for placement in plazas or along boulevards.
description: A tall, rectangular obelisk with tan stone blocks and green Art Deco relief at the base, featuring smooth and decorative surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative relief and ribbed green base, with tan stone blocks above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the obelisk's thin profile and the seam between the front and back surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, displaying the same decorative relief and stone block pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the transition between the green base and tan upper section.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative Art Deco-style relief with vertical ribbing and geometric motifs on the lower front and rear sections.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and features a prominent greenish relief with vertical ribbing and stylized geometric patterns, giving it a visually distinct foundation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and unadorned, matching the tan stone block pattern of the upper section with no unique features.
